detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BABYAPE._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BABYAPE.sol#667-791):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BABYAPE.sol#731)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BABYAPE.sol#805-817)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BABYAPE.sol#737)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (BABYAPE.sol#825)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (BABYAPE.sol#827)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYAPE.sol#789)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BABYAPE.sol#953)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BABYAPE.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BABYAPE.sol#935)
	BABYAPE._rOwned (BABYAPE.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BABYAPE._takeTeam(uint256) (BABYAPE.sol#947-955)
	- BABYAPE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BABYAPE.sol#907-943)
	- BABYAPE.balanceOf(address) (BABYAPE.sol#493-497)
	- BABYAPE.constructor() (BABYAPE.sol#423-457)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (BABYAPE.sol#789)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BABYAPE.sol#961)
	BABYAPE._rTotal (BABYAPE.sol#337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BABYAPE._getCurrentSupply() (BABYAPE.sol#1111-1123)
	- BABYAPE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BABYAPE.sol#959-965)
	- BABYAPE.constructor() (BABYAPE.sol#423-457)
	- BABYAPE.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BABYAPE.sol#589-611)
detectors.markdown:

		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](BABYAPE.sol#L825)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](BABYAPE.sol#L827)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](BABYAPE.sol#L953)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](BABYAPE.sol#L933)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](BABYAPE.sol#L935)
	[BABYAPE._rOwned](BABYAPE.sol#L325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [BABYAPE._takeTeam(uint256)](BABYAPE.sol#L947-L955)
	- [BABYAPE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](BABYAPE.sol#L907-L943)
	- [BABYAPE.balanceOf(address)](BABYAPE.sol#L493-L497)
	- [BABYAPE.constructor()](BABYAPE.sol#L423-L457)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](BABYAPE.sol#L789)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](BABYAPE.sol#L961)
	[BABYAPE._rTotal](BABYAPE.sol#L337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [BABYAPE._getCurrentSupply()](BABYAPE.sol#L1111-L1123)
	- [BABYAPE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](BABYAPE.sol#L959-L965)
	- [BABYAPE.constructor()](BABYAPE.sol#L423-L457)
	- [BABYAPE.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](BABYAPE.sol#L589-L611)
